define.name: RTC_BASE_YEAR
define.brief: Base year of the RTC broken-down representation.

typedef.name: hal_rtc_driver_c
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an RTC driver.

typedef.name: hal_rtc_config_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an RTC configuration.

typedef.name: rtcalarm_t
typedef.brief: Type of an RTC alarm number.

struct.name: hal_rtc_config
struct.note: Implementations may extend this structure to contain more, architecture dependent, fields.

field.name: cr
field.brief: Initial value for the RTC CR register.

field.name: prer
field.brief: Initial value for the RTC PRER register.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ rtc_lld_config_fields;
/* End of the mandatory fields.*/ rtc_lld_driver_fields;

method.name: rtcSetDateTime
rtcGetDateTimeX
rtcSetTime64
method.brief: Sets the RTC from a 64-bit UTC time value.

method.name: rtcGetTime64X
method.brief: Reads the RTC as a 64-bit UTC time value.

method.name: rtcGetTime64
method.brief: Reads the RTC as a 64-bit UTC time value.

method.name: rtcSetAlarm
rtcGetAlarm
rtcGetEventsX
method.brief: Returns the cached RTC event flags.

method.name: rtcGetAndClearEventsX
method.brief: Gets and clears cached RTC event flags.
method.param: Mask of events to be returned and cleared.

function.name: rtcConvertDateTimeToTime64
function.brief: Converts broken-down RTC time to a 64-bit UTC time value.

function.name: rtcConvertTime64ToDateTime
function.brief: Converts a 64-bit UTC time value to broken-down RTC time.

function.name: rtc_is_leap_year
function.brief: Checks if the specified year is a leap year.

function.name: rtc_get_month_length
function.brief: Returns the length of a month in days.

function.name: rtc_datetime_is_valid
function.brief: Checks the validity of a broken-down RTC time value.
function.param: RTC time value to be checked.

function.name: rtc_days_from_civil
function.brief: Converts a civil date to days from the Unix epoch.

function.name: rtc_civil_from_days
function.brief: Converts days from the Unix epoch to a civil date.

function.name: rtc_encode_day_of_week
function.brief: Converts epoch days to RTC day-of-week encoding.
